zh.Shevington, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾分頓
zh.Upton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord George Woodward於1450年出生在英國藍卡爾分頓時，他的父親Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor20歲，母親'Agnes' Anne Corbet23歲。他於1476年與Bridgett Upton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾分頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1545年8月30日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓享年95歲。

zh-hans.Shevington, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾分頓
zh-hans.Upton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾厄普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord George Woodward于1450年出生在英国藍卡爾分頓时，他的父亲Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor20岁，母亲'Agnes' Anne Corbet23岁。他于1476年与Bridgett Upton在英国英格兰藍卡爾分頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1545年8月30日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾厄普頓享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord George Woodward was born in 1450, in Shevington, Lancashire, England, his father, Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor, was 20 and his mother, 'Agnes' Anne Corbet, was 23. He married Bridgett Upton in 1476, in Shevington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 30 August 1545, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord George Woodward est né en 1450, à Shevington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor, avait 20 ans et sa mère, 'Agnes' Anne Corbet, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Bridgett Upton en 1476, à Shevington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 30 août 1545, à Upton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord George Woodward 1450 in Shevington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor 20 und seine Mutter 'Agnes' Anne Corbet 23. Er hat 1476 in Shevington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Bridgett Upton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 30. August 1545 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord George Woodward è nato il nel 1450 nel Shevington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, 'Agnes' Anne Corbet, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Bridgett Upton nel 1476, nel Shevington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 30 agosto 1545, nel Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord George Woodwardが1450年にイギリスランカシュアイアシェヴィントンで生まれた時，父Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manorは20歳，母'Agnes' Anne Corbetは23歳であった。1476年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアシェヴィントンでBridgett Uptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1545年8月30日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウプトンで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord George Woodward(이)가 1450년 영국 랭카실르 셰빙턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 'Agnes' Anne Corbet(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 셰빙턴에서 Bridgett Upton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1545년 8월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord George Woodward nasceu em 1450, em Shevington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, 'Agnes' Anne Corbet, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Bridgett Upton em 1476, em Shevington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1545, em Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord George Woodward родился в 1450 г. в местности шевингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали 'Agnes' Anne Corbet, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Bridgett Upton в 1476 г. в местности шевингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 30 августа 1545 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord George Woodward nació en 1450, en Shevington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord George Woodward               Shevington Manor of Shavinton Manor, tenía 20 años y su mamá, 'Agnes' Anne Corbet, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Bridgett Upton en 1476, en Shevington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1545, en Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 95 años.
